items.title: The fittest founder in the room got cancer. Here’s how he used AI to fight back.
items.description: When confronted with cancer, Connor Christou fed everything tied tied to his regime — blood results, scan data, wearable output, journal entries — into Claude.

items.title_en: The fittest founder in the room got cancer. Here’s how he used AI to fight back.

items.title_clean: 癌症患者使用AI助手Claude管理健康数据

items.title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like  models as Anthropic’s export ban drags on
items.description: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.

items.title_zh: 特朗普誓言对数字服务税征收 100% 关税
items.title_bilingual: 特朗普誓言对数字服务税征收 100% 关税 / Trump Vows 100% Tariff on Countries Over Digital Services Taxes
items.title_clean: 特朗普威胁对征收数字服务税国家实施100%关税
items.summary: 特朗普总统威胁将对征收数字服务税的国家实施100%关税，此举向刚刚批准贸易协定的欧洲国家施压。这一政策动向可能影响全球数字服务贸易格局，对元宝产品经理关注国际数字服务市场环境变化有参考价值。

items.title: BlackBerry CEO Says Safety Software Offers AI-Resistant Growth
items.description: BlackBerry Ltd. Chief Executive Officer John Giamatteo had a direct answer when asked about one of the biggest challenges to software providers: Artificial intelligence isn’t ready to displace his saf
items.title_original: BlackBerry CEO Says Safety Software Offers AI-Resistant Growth
items.title_en: BlackBerry CEO Says Safety Software Offers AI-Resistant Growth
items.title_zh: 黑莓首席执行官表示安全软件可实现抗人工智能增长
items.title_bilingual: 黑莓首席执行官表示安全软件可实现抗人工智能增长 / BlackBerry CEO Says Safety Software Offers AI-Resistant Growth
items.title_clean: BlackBerry CEO：安全软件提供AI抗性增长
items.summary: BlackBerry CEO John Giamatteo表示，人工智能尚无法取代其安全软件，安全软件具有AI抗性，能够提供稳定增长。这对AI产品经理了解安全领域与AI的竞争关系及市场机会有参考价值。

items.title: Elroy Air’s Cargo Drone Bet
items.description: Elroy Air is going public at a roughly $1 billion valuation, aiming to replace delivery trucks with long-range cargo drones. CEO Andrew Clare joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain how the company’s
items.title_original: Elroy Air’s Cargo Drone Bet
items.title_en: Elroy Air’s Cargo Drone Bet
items.title_zh: Elroy Air 的货运无人机赌注
items.title_bilingual: Elroy Air 的货运无人机赌注 / Elroy Air’s Cargo Drone Bet
items.title_clean: Elroy Air：货运无人机公司
items.summary: Elroy Air计划以约10亿美元估值上市，旨在用长程货运无人机取代传统配送卡车。CEO Andrew Clare在Bloomberg Open Interest节目中介绍了公司的发展战略和技术应用，为物流自动化领域提供了新思路。

items.title: BlackBerry CEO Giamatteo Sees QNX Powering Growth
items.description: BlackBerry CEO John Giamatteo discusses the company’s evolution into a software and infrastructure player, centered on its QNX operating system. He highlights that QNX now powers over 275 million vehi
items.title_original: BlackBerry CEO Giamatteo Sees QNX Powering Growth
items.title_en: BlackBerry CEO Giamatteo Sees QNX Powering Growth
items.title_zh: 黑莓首席执行官 Giamatteo 认为 QNX 推动增长
items.title_bilingual: 黑莓首席执行官 Giamatteo 认为 QNX 推动增长 / BlackBerry CEO Giamatteo Sees QNX Powering Growth
items.title_clean: BlackBerry CEO：QNX操作系统推动公司增长
items.summary: BlackBerry CEO John Giamatteo讨论公司向软件和基础设施领域的转型，核心是其QNX操作系统。他强调QNX现已支持超过2.75亿辆汽车，展示了该系统在车载领域的广泛应用和商业价值。
